news.paragraph: The Nasdaq 100 ETF (QQQ) is trading amidst a market environment where the Dow shows indecision on jobless claims, biotech stocks are easing, and Nvidia's performance is wavering around its earnings report. While there's a positive outlook for emerging markets from a CIO, the immediate context for QQQ is one of mixed signals and sector-specific volatility. Traders should monitor tech sector movements and any broader market reactions to economic data.

headlines.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Wavers On Jobless Claims; Biotechs Ease, Nvidia Waffles On Earnings (Live Coverage)
Emerging markets could soar this year, says CIO
